Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to update a DECLARE model to mitigate bias in a loan application process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First let me understand the context This is a loan application review process There are sensitive attributes ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace Decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo Potential bias Decisions might be influenced by sensitive attributes without proper checks

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The current model has existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication to FinalDecision response StartApplication to RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to add constraints to prevent bias Let me think about what activities I should introduce Sensitive attribute checks CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge or similar Bias mitigation activities ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck Specific decision variants Maybe Approve Minority Reject Minority etc or just general decisions that might be biased

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Actually looking at the prompt examples Approve Minority or Reject Minority these seem like specific activity names indicating decisions for minority groups CheckApplicantRace activity that reveals sensitive info ManualReview additional check for fairness BiasMitigationCheck specific check to prevent bias

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Constraints to add 1 Coexistence If a decision for sensitive group occurs eg Reject Minority ManualReview must coexist 2 Response Succession Ensure decisions do not immediately follow sensitive attribute checks without BiasMitigationCheck 3 Non succession Prevent direct succession from CheckApplicantRace to Reject or FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For coexistence If we have Reject Minority we must have ManualReview The prompt suggests If a decision step occurs for a sensitive applicant eg Approve Minority or Reject Minority ensure a ManualReview activity always coexists in the trace So coexistence Reject Minority to ManualReview and Approve Minority to ManualReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For response succession to ensure checks happen If CheckApplicantRace happens then later BiasMitigationCheck must happen response The prompt specifically mentions Ensure that certain decision steps Approve Reject cannot immediately follow an activity disclosing sensitive attributes eg CheckApplicantRace without first performing a BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To prevent immediate succession we use nonchainsuccession between CheckApplicantRace and Reject The prompt says Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event eg CheckApplicantRace to a decision event Reject to avoid immediate biased outcomes

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me check DECLARE semantics nonchainsuccession A B means A cannot be directly followed by B nonsuccession A B means A cannot be followed by B anywhere after which is too strong

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also want to ensure that if sensitive info is checked a mitigation check happens before decision This could be response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck and precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision This ensures mitigation check precedes any final decision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: New activities to reference CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck race check must be followed by bias mitigation response CheckApplicantGender to BiasMitigationCheck response CheckApplicantAge to BiasMitigationCheck precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision FinalDecision must be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantGender to FinalDecision nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantAge to FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: coexistence FinalDecision to ManualReview would require ManualReview in every trace with FinalDecision which might be too strict

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternative response CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview if race checked manual review must happen response CheckApplicantGender to ManualReview This ensures manual review happens after checking sensitive attributes

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: The prompt specifically mentions coexistence for sensitive decisions So I will add both responded existence for sensitive attribute checks to ManualReview and specific coexistence for RejectMinority to ManualReview introducing RejectMinority as a new activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: New activities referenced CheckApplicantRace CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantAge BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview RejectMinority example of sensitive decision ApproveMinority example of sensitive decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: responded existence CheckApplicantRace to ManualReview CheckApplicantGender to ManualReview CheckApplicantAge to ManualReview coexistence RejectMinority to ManualReview ApproveMinority to ManualReview response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantGender to BiasMitigationCheck CheckApplicantAge to BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: If I put BiasMitigationCheck or ManualReview in existence they must appear in every trace That is too strong I should not put them in existence unless required in all traces

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: precedence BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision and nonchainsuccession CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision CheckApplicantGender to FinalDecision CheckApplicantAge to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I should check if I can have multiple keys in the nested dictionaries Yes the format is for binary constraints source to target with support and confidence

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Response and precedence together give succession I can include both or just succession Actually succession A B equals response A B plus precedence A B So I could use succession between BiasMitigationCheck and FinalDecision instead of separate response and precedence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: succession BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision means BiasMitigationCheck must be followed by FinalDecision and FinalDecision must be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck So that is exactly what we want

Name: Validation - PE
